name: Empirical Ledger — A/B Testing Coach
persona: Growth PM or Experimentation Lead running A/B tests without a dedicated statistician
problem_statement: A PM reading an experiment result alone will misinterpret an underpowered test as a win — this tool surfaces the statistical reasoning at the point of decision
artifact_type: single-page web app with experiment input form, statistical analysis panel, and interpretation guide
description: Single-page web app that surfaces statistical reasoning for PMs reading A/B test results without a dedicated statistician
notes: Hosted on Google Stitch — not on GitHub Pages. Decision log lives in this repo.
